items.name: SDK stream processing shared abstraction
validation: SdkStreamProcessor extracted to src/sdk-stream.ts — 15 typed event kinds, single extractSdkEvent() function ✓
session-worker.ts uses shared processor — all `as any` casts removed from stream loop ✓
App.tsx uses shared processor — all `as any` casts removed from stream loop ✓
15 unit tests for extractSdkEvent covering all event kinds + null cases ✓
Full test suite (264 tests) passes — no behavioral regression ✓
TypeScript compiles with zero errors ✓

items.name: Double error on worker init failure
validation: Worker error IPC handler now calls safeReject() — settles promise before exit handler fires ✓
Exit handler's safeReject is a no-op when error already settled (via settled flag) ✓
Error message forwarded to client via ws.send before promise rejection ✓
Worker still exits non-zero on init failure (process.exit(1) unchanged in session-worker.ts) ✓

items.name: QueryMutex timeout
validation: acquire(key, timeoutMs) signature added — optional parameter, backward compatible ✓
MutexTimeoutError thrown with key and timeoutMs properties ✓
Timed-out waiter removed from queue via splice ✓
serve.ts passes 5-minute timeout to prevent permanent lockout ✓
5 new tests: timeout throws, waiter removed, no regression, success-in-time, FIFO preserved ✓
All existing mutex tests pass without modification ✓

items.name: Token revocation safeCompare
validation: safeCompare exported from access.ts (was private function) ✓
serve.ts imports safeCompare ✓
onAccessChange uses safeCompare for tokenHash comparison ✓
3 unit tests: equal strings, different strings, different-length strings ✓

items.name: WebSocket message schema validation
validation: Zod discriminated union schema for all 6 WS client message types ✓
validateWsMessage() returns discriminated { ok, message } | { ok, error } result ✓
serve.ts calls validateWsMessage after JSON.parse, rejects invalid with structured error ✓
15 unit tests: valid messages, type coercion rejects, unknown types, null/non-object, empty fields ✓

items.name: Worker ready timeout
validation: 30s WORKER_READY_TIMEOUT_MS constant added ✓
InternalWorkerState gains readyTimer and ready flag ✓
Ready timer started on spawn, cleared when 'ready' IPC received ✓
Timeout kills worker via this.kill(conversationKey) ✓
Timer cleared on worker exit and kill() to prevent leaks ✓

items.name: Pending approval cleanup on worker crash
validation: workerExitHandler iterates pendingApprovals and resolves each with false (denied) ✓
Client receives tool_approval_rejected frame with reason for each pending approval ✓
pendingApprovals.clear() called after processing ✓
WS send wrapped in try/catch (connection may already be closed) ✓

items.name: Configurable maxWorkers in HarnessConfig
validation: serve.maxWorkers added to HarnessConfig interface (optional number) ✓
Default remains 20 (DEFAULT_MAX_WORKERS in worker-manager.ts) ✓
WorkerManager receives opts.config.serve?.maxWorkers in serve.ts ✓
config.yaml override flows through deepMerge ✓

items.name: Worker pool size in /health/deep
validation: WorkerPoolStats interface added: { active, max, utilization } ✓
DeepHealth.stats.workerPool field added ✓
HealthMonitor constructor accepts getWorkerPoolStats callback ✓
serve.ts passes lambda using workerManager.size and workerManager.capacity ✓
WorkerManager.capacity getter exposes maxWorkers ✓
utilization = active/max rounded to 3 decimal places ✓
